heroHeadline: Fukushima Daiichi: 15 Years of Recovery and Decommissioning
heroSubtitle: TEPCO's 30-40 year decommissioning roadmap continues; ALPS water release program ongoing since August 2023; exclusion zones partially lifted.
footerNote: Data sourced from TEPCO, Japan NRA, IAEA, NHK, and peer-reviewed health studies.
